columns.name: category_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each product category; primary key for UPSERT operations

columns.name: category_name
columns.description: Name of the product category

columns.name: description
columns.description: Descriptive text for the category

columns.name: parent_category_id
columns.description: Self-referencing FK supporting category hierarchy; null for top-level categories

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp; used as partition column

columns.name: supplier_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each supplier; primary key for UPSERT operations

columns.name: supplier_name
columns.description: Name of the supplier

columns.name: contact_email
columns.description: Supplier contact email address

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the supplier is based; cluster column for geographic filtering

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Flag indicating whether the supplier is currently active

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp; used as partition column

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each product; primary key for UPSERT operations

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: Name of the product

columns.name: sku
columns.description: Stock keeping unit code; natural business key

columns.name: category_id
columns.description: FK to stg_categories; cluster column for category-based product queries

columns.name: supplier_id
columns.description: FK to stg_suppliers; cluster column for supplier-based product queries

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Per-unit selling price; NUMERIC preserves exact decimal precision

columns.name: description
columns.description: Product description text

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Flag indicating whether the product is active; cluster column for active/inactive filtering

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update timestamp; partition column (DAY) and incremental watermark for daily sync

columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each inventory record; primary key for UPSERT operations

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: FK to stg_products; cluster column for product-based inventory queries

columns.name: warehouse_code
columns.description: Identifier for the warehouse location; cluster column for warehouse-based queries

columns.name: quantity_on_hand
columns.description: Current stock quantity at the warehouse; key metric for inventory trend analysis

columns.name: reorder_level
columns.description: Stock level threshold at which a reorder should be triggered

columns.name: last_restocked_date
columns.description: Date of the most recent restocking event

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update timestamp; partition column (DAY) and incremental watermark for daily sync

cardinality.notes: Many products may belong to one category; category_id is nullable in products allowing uncategorised products
Many products may be sourced from one supplier; supplier_id is nullable allowing products without an assigned supplier
Multiple inventory records can exist per product across different warehouse locations
Self-referencing hierarchy; parent_category_id is nullable for top-level root categories
